name: Vanishing Tracks

spell.name: Vanishing Tracks
spell.deity: Dachzerul, Kalekot, Kelinahat, Ketephys, Ng, Tanagaar, Ulon, Zarongel

heightened.text: The duration increases to 8 hours. The spell has a range of 20 feet and an area of a 20-foot emanation, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within that area.

text: You obscure the tracks you leave behind. The DC of checks to Track you gains a +4 status bonus or is equal to your spell DC, whichever results in a higher DC.
